title: Enhance Reels and Video Experience

requirements.text: Enhance the ReelsPage to support smooth vertical snap-scrolling between full-screen reel cards, with autoplay for the active reel and pause for off-screen reels. Include a progress bar indicator at the top of each reel showing playback progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Reels page displays videos in a full-screen vertically snapping feed
Active reel autoplays; off-screen reels pause automatically
A thin progress bar at the top of each reel card reflects current playback position
Scrolling between reels is smooth and snaps to each card

requirements.text: Enhance the ReelCard component with an improved action sidebar including: like count with animated heart, comment count badge opening the comments drawer, share button, and a follow/subscribe button on the uploader's avatar. Display the video title and description as an overlay at the bottom with a 'show more' expand interaction for long descriptions.
acceptanceCriteria: Action sidebar shows like button with animated heart and running like count
Comment button shows comment count badge and opens ReelCommentsDrawer on tap
Share button copies the reel URL and shows a toast confirmation
Uploader avatar in the overlay has a subscribe/follow button
Video title and description are shown as a bottom overlay
Long descriptions are truncated with a 'Show more' toggle

requirements.text: Add a 'For You' and 'Following' tab switcher at the top of the ReelsPage. 'For You' shows all short-form videos; 'Following' shows reels only from channels the authenticated user subscribes to. Show a prompt to log in or subscribe if the Following feed is empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Two tabs ('For You' and 'Following') appear at the top of the Reels page
'For You' tab displays all short-form videos
'Following' tab displays reels from subscribed channels only
Unauthenticated users see a login prompt on the Following tab
Authenticated users with no subscriptions see a prompt to subscribe to channels

requirements.text: Enhance the VideoPlayerPage to support a theatre/cinematic mode toggle that expands the video player to full page width while collapsing the sidebar. Add chapter markers on the seek bar if the video description contains timestamps in the format 'MM:SS Title'. Show a looping end-screen with recommended video thumbnails when playback finishes.
acceptanceCriteria: A theatre mode button in the video player toggles full-width layout and collapses the recommendations sidebar
Seek bar displays chapter markers parsed from 'MM:SS Title' timestamp lines in the video description
Hovering a chapter marker on the seek bar shows the chapter title as a tooltip
When video ends, an end-screen overlay displays clickable recommended video thumbnails
End-screen auto-selects the next recommended video after a 5-second countdown

requirements.text: Add a backend query to fetch short-form videos (reels) from channels that the authenticated caller subscribes to, returning VideoMetadata records sorted by upload date descending.
acceptanceCriteria: A new query function getSubscribedReels exists in the backend actor
It returns only videos marked as short-form (isShort = true) from subscribed channels
Results are sorted by uploadedAt descending
Returns an empty array if the caller has no subscriptions or is anonymous

requirements.text: Create a useGetSubscribedReels React Query hook that calls the new getSubscribedReels backend query and returns the reel list, enabled only when an authenticated identity is available.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook file exists at frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribedReels.ts
Hook calls the backend actor's getSubscribedReels method
Query is disabled when no authenticated identity is present
Returns loading, error, and data states consistent with other query hooks in the project

requirements.text: Add a mute/unmute toggle button with animated icon transition on the ReelCard component. Persist the mute preference in localStorage so that newly scrolled-to reels respect the last mute state.
acceptanceCriteria: Each reel card shows a mute/unmute button with a smooth icon animation
Toggling mute on one reel persists the state to localStorage
Newly visible reels initialize their mute state from localStorage

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain within the single backend/main.mo actor
nonGoals: Live streaming or real-time video features
Video transcoding or server-side video processing
External video CDN or third-party video hosting integration
